Document:
# Snails
Snails are small, durable molluscs that have made their way aboard the station. They cannot speak but can emote.
As a snail you are [bold]tiny[/bold], able to fit into small spaces. You are [bold]harmless[/bold] and have no way to attack.
Be careful around [color=yellow]salt[/color]. Contact with salt or saline solutions will [bold]hurt you[/bold].
## Variants
- [bold]Snail[/bold]: a standard snail. - [bold]Speed Snail[/bold]: a snail with significantly increased movement speed. - [bold]Snoth[/bold]: a snail and moth hybrid produced by genetics. Has a distinctive appearance and can fit into spaces suited to moth-sized creatures.
